name: socialsafety
description: ``` socialsafety/ ├── index.html          ← Open this in your browser ├── css/ │   └── main.css        ← All styles └── js/     ├── data.js         ← All mock data (alerts, teams, settings)     ├── charts.js       ← Chart.js chart initializations     ├── ui.js           ← DOM rendering helpers     └── app.js          ← Navigation, actions, live simulation ```
